ci_evidence.local_rerun_blocker: audit environment could not resolve github.com

accepted_remediation: weights are computed from frozen declarative strategy artifacts
universe inclusion is produced by a fixed lifecycle rule over the complete partition
A-share raw split, dividend and terminal economics affect portfolio accounting
base and adverse transaction-cost cases enter actual simulations
retry intent is separated from post-open no-fill evidence
package and active settings hashes are internally computed
persistent experiment ledger, multiplicity checks, HAC/bootstrap and stage identities are integrated
generic, retrospective and gross-only evidence is explicitly downgraded

findings.title: Provider-qualified source bytes are not bound to typed business values
findings.impact: A provider receipt can be attached to manually constructed values that do not match provider bytes.
findings.minimum_fix: Introduce typed parser receipts generated from exact provider bytes; candidate objects must be produced from those receipts.

findings.title: SplitManifest can be manually forged
findings.impact: Samples, folds and label horizons can be changed while reusing the expected manifest digest.
findings.minimum_fix: Add controlled construction, canonical serialization, verified loading and hash recomputation before evaluation.

findings.title: Multiplicity families can be split or extended after holdout access
findings.impact: The total number of attempts against one holdout can be understated despite correct within-family adjustment.
findings.minimum_fix: Derive a stable holdout_id, allow one frozen family per holdout, prohibit additions after access and verify a real anchor receipt.

findings.title: Holdout p-values and result SHA are not bound to SplitEvaluation and the final stage chain
findings.impact: A favorable raw p-value can be supplied independently of the frozen returns and final backtest result.
findings.minimum_fix: Create a HoldoutResultReceipt that internally derives p-value and result identity from final stage hash, returns and SplitEvaluation.

findings.title: HAC/bootstrap sample order and estimator parameters are not preregistered
findings.impact: Sample subset/order, bandwidth or block length can be selected after viewing holdout returns.
findings.minimum_fix: Freeze a SplitEvaluationPlan before holdout access and evaluate a sample_id-to-return mapping in canonical temporal order.

findings.title: Dataset partitions lack PIT source receipts
findings.impact: A fixed local partition can still contain future revisions or data unavailable at dataset as-of.
findings.minimum_fix: Bind every source snapshot and partition to provider qualification, available_at, parser/schema identity and dataset as-of.

findings.title: Critical receipts cannot be stably reloaded across processes
findings.impact: The system is deterministic inside one process but cannot yet prove cross-day or cross-machine replay of the same stage hash.
findings.minimum_fix: Add canonical run-bundle serialization and verified loaders; separate stable source identity from acquisition audit time.

findings.title: Adjusted A-share prices can enter the cash/share accounting engine
findings.impact: QFQ/HFQ/total-return values can be treated as executable cash units without factor conversion.
findings.minimum_fix: Keep the portfolio and execution engine raw-price-only; adjusted series remain feature inputs unless explicit unit conversion is implemented.

findings.title: Execution calendar revision rows are not individually provider-qualified
findings.minimum_fix: Include every revision session row source in candidate provider qualification.

findings.title: A retry instruction is not required to follow the previous no-fill observed_at
findings.minimum_fix: Require instruction N+1 decision_at to be later than no-fill event N observed_at.

findings.title: Canonical ingest lineage omits capture_level and owner remains a caller label
findings.minimum_fix: Persist capture_level, enforce a target minimum grade and derive canonical owner from controlled configuration.

findings.title: Run parameters and final stage completion are not fully reconciled with preregistration
findings.minimum_fix: Add a CandidateRunConfig receipt and only permit a holdout result for the final stage of the preregistered plan.

minimum_closeout_architecture: one canonical experiment ledger and AnchorReceipt
canonical run bundle and verified loaders
raw-only A-share portfolio and execution prices
external_evidence_pending: real frozen dataset, universe, returns and corporate-action artifacts
